meta.siteDescription: MyClup helps gyms manage memberships, classes, and bookings. Discover gyms near you and book classes online.

shell.subtitle: One shell for access, conversations, and member actions.

adminShell.title: Operations workspace
adminShell.subtitle: Coordinate schedules, attendance, and member follow-up from one consistent control room.
adminShell.chatSubtitle: Handle active member conversations without leaving the admin shell.

scheduleWorkspace.heroSubtitle: Track the next sessions, keep participant rosters current, and update attendance without leaving the shared booking flow.
scheduleWorkspace.sessionsSubtitle: Browse branch and instructor activity from the shared scheduling API.
scheduleWorkspace.participantsSubtitle: Keep booking states and attendance updates aligned with the backend source of truth.
scheduleWorkspace.availabilitySubtitle: Review upcoming availability blocks beside the operational roster.
scheduleWorkspace.loadingBody: Loading calendar, capacity, and attendance data...
scheduleWorkspace.emptyBody: The calendar workspace will populate as soon as the first class or appointment is created.
scheduleWorkspace.errorBody: Try again to refresh the scheduling workspace.
scheduleWorkspace.noParticipants: No participants in this session yet.

dashboard.heroSubtitle: Check your membership, open the latest conversation, or jump into the next member action.
dashboard.membershipSubtitle: See the current plan and the next action point.
dashboard.quickActionsSubtitle: Keep the most common member tasks within reach.
dashboard.paymentsSubtitle: Placeholder for billing nudges and renewal reminders.
dashboard.notificationsSubtitle: Ready for alerts, reminders, and status updates.

membershipDashboard.errorBody: Try again to refresh the membership summary.

messagesDashboard.emptyBody: Your chat inbox will appear here once a conversation starts.
messagesDashboard.errorBody: Try again to refresh the latest conversations.

quickActions.bookClassHint: Booking lands in the next surface.
quickActions.showQrHint: Open the member pass in membership.

paymentsDashboard.body: When payment or renewal reminders are ready, they will surface here.

notificationsDashboard.body: This slot is reserved for push and in-app notifications.

notifications.heroSubtitle: See what needs your attention now, and what will land here once delivery channels go live.
notifications.centerSubtitle: Current reminders come from existing membership and chat data. Future transport-backed alerts stay explicit placeholders.
notifications.loadingBody: Checking membership urgency and unread conversations.
notifications.errorBody: Try again to refresh the latest member signals.
notifications.membershipExpiredBody: Renew now to restore access and keep the member surface current.
notifications.membershipExpiringBody: Renew before the access window closes to avoid interruption.
notifications.chatUnreadBodySingle: You have {{count}} unread message waiting in the latest conversation.
notifications.chatUnreadBodyMany: You have {{count}} unread messages across active conversations.
notifications.caughtUpBody: There are no urgent member reminders right now. This center will keep future alerts in one place.
notifications.bookingPlaceholderBody: Class reminders and waitlist nudges will appear here after the booking surface is wired.
notifications.updatesPlaceholderBody: Push, campaign, and app update alerts remain placeholders until delivery transport is enabled.
notifications.quickLinksSubtitle: Jump directly into the member surfaces connected to these reminders.

profile.title: Profile and settings
profile.subtitle: Manage the member details supported today and track which settings arrive next.
profile.loadingBody: Fetching your member identity and settings surface.
profile.errorBody: Try again to refresh your profile and settings data.

supported.title: Editable basics
supported.subtitle: These fields are backed by the current auth profile API.

linkedGym.title: Linked gym context
linkedGym.subtitle: Resolved from the authenticated tenant scope.

placeholders.title: Next settings domains
placeholders.subtitle: These profile/settings areas stay visible even before persistence lands.
placeholders.emergencyBody: Emergency contact editing will land once member profile persistence expands beyond auth fields.
placeholders.healthBody: Health notes and waiver-aware profile notes are reserved for a future backed slice.
placeholders.notificationsBody: Push, booking, and payment notification preferences will be wired when transport support is active.
placeholders.privacyBody: Privacy and consent controls will surface here when policy and consent persistence is ready.
placeholders.agreementsBody: Signed forms, waivers, and member agreements will appear here in a later document slice.
placeholders.helpBody: Contextual help and support shortcuts will expand here without changing the shell layout.

profile.heroSubtitle: Update the fields the member app supports and review the rest of the account surface.

form.title: Profile details
form.subtitle: Only supported fields can be edited here.

linkedGym.title: Linked gym context
linkedGym.subtitle: Current tenant scope and role assignments.

sections.title: Support and settings placeholders
sections.subtitle: These sections are reserved for the next profile iterations.

emergencyContact.body: Emergency contact management is not connected yet.

privacy.title: Privacy

privacy.body: Privacy controls will be added in a later surface.
